title: Ensure Comparators are Serializable
description: A non-serializable Comparator can prevent an otherwise-Serializable ordered collection from being serializable. Making Comparators serializable is good defensive programming.
recommendation: Implement Serializable interface in Comparator classes
impact: Improves code quality by ensuring serializability of ordered collections

compliant: public class FruitComparator implements Comparator<Fruit>, Serializable { ... }
